snippet.title: The Weeknd - Save Your Tears (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
Official music video by The Weeknd performing "Save Your Tears"вҖ“ 'After Hours' available everywhere now: http://theweeknd.co/afterhoursYD
 
в–әSubscribe to The Weeknd on YouTube: http://theweeknd.co/subscribeYD 
 
в–әGet exclusive merch: https://shop.theweeknd.com/
 
в–әFollow The Weeknd:
https://twitter.com/theweeknd 
https://www.facebook.com/theweeknd 
https://www.instagram.com/theweeknd 
https://www.theweeknd.com 

Directed by Cliqua
Produced by RoisГӯn Audrey Moloney
Executive Producer: Jerad Anderson
Production Company: Florence
AbelвҖҷs Costume Designer: Matt Henson
Prosthetics: Mike Marino, Prosthetic Renaissance
Director of Photography: Xiaolong Liu
Production Designer: Annie Sperling
1st AD: Mike Alberts
Production Supervisor: Tori Storosh
Production Supervisor: Joe Keenan
Assist. Production Supervisor: Linda Nhem
Cast Costume Designer: Lisa Madonna
Gaffer: Matt Ardine
Key Grip: Jon Booker
Camera Operator Nick Muller
Steadicam Colin MacDonnell
Editor: Miles Trahan
Color: Matt Osbourne @ Company 3
Sound Design: Christian Stropko
VFX: Buralqy + MADNOMAD
Online: Sunset Edit
Titles: Bradley Pinkerton

Lyrics:

Ooh
Na na, yeah
I saw you dancing in a crowded room
You look so happy when I'm not with you
But then you saw me, caught you by surprise
A single teardrop falling from your eye
I don't know why I run away
I make you cry when I run away
You could've asked me why I broke your heart
You could've told me that you fell apart
But you walked past me like I wasn't there
And just pretended like you didn't care
I don't know why I run away
I make you cry when I run away
Take me back 'cause I wanna stay
Save your tears for another
Save your tears for another day
Save your tears for another day
So
I made you think that I would always stay
I said some things that I should never say
Yeah, I broke your heart like someone did to mine
And now you won't love me for a second time
I don't know why I run away, oh, girl
Said I make you cry when I run away
Girl, take me back 'cause I wanna stay
Save your tears for another
I realize that I'm much too late
And you deserve someone better
Save your tears for another day (Ooh, yeah)
Save your tears for another day (Yeah)
I don't know why I run away
I make you cry when I run away
Save your tears for another day, ooh, girl (Ah)
I said save your tears for another day (Ah)
Save your tears for another day (Ah)
Save your tears for another day (Ah)

#TheWeeknd #SaveYourTears #AfterHours

Music video by The Weeknd performing Save Your Tears. В© 2021 The Weeknd XO, Inc., manufactured and marketed by Republic Records, a division of UMG Recordings, Inc.

http://vevo.ly/7MOdnq

snippet.title: 'Read them and understand them!' Handforth Parish Council meeting goes viral after massive Zoom row
snippet.description:
#Handforth Parish Councillors have become unlikely internet sensations as a Zoom row during a December meeting has gone viral. 

For the full story, click here: https://www.telegraph.co.uk/news/2021/02/05/have-no-authority-parish-council-meeting-video-goes-viral-massive/?li_source=LI&li_medium=liftigniter-onward-journey

Council members traded insults and some were ultimately booted off the Zoom call.

snippet.title: I Spent 100 Hours Customizing The World's Largest PS5 ($70,000)
snippet.description:
I can't believe we spent 100 hours customizing the world's largest Playstation 5 and gave PS5's away to subscribers lol

Hope you enjoyed! Subscribe right now and you'll be a part of the giveaways! Thanks for watching :)

If you're not yet subscribed, I promise you won't regret subscribing! If you're already subscribed, I love you! вқӨпёҸ
Subscribe and you might be picked to be in my next video! It's free and it would genuinely make me super happy if you subscribed! рҹҘә

Subscribe to all our channels!
ZHC Crafts: @ZHC Crafts 
ZHC Shorts: @ZHC Shorts 
MsMunchie: @MsMunchie 

This PS5 is 10 feet tall (3 meters) weighs 500 pounds (227 kilograms) and cost me $70,000 in total! This playstation 5 is insane! We spent over 4 months putting together this video for you!

Follow my socials too!
Instagram - https://www.instagram.com/zhc
Twitter - https://twitter.com/zhc_yt
Facebook - https://www.facebook.com/ZHC/

If you scrolled till the end... i luv u рҹҘәвқӨпёҸ

snippet.title: Godzilla vs. Kong вҖ“ Official Trailer
snippet.description:
In theaters and streaming exclusively on @HBOMax* March 26.
В 
*Available on @HBOMax in the US only, for 31 days, at no extra cost to subscribers.

https://www.godzillavskong.com/
https://www.facebook.com/GodzillaVsKong
https://www.instagram.com/godzillavskong/
https://twitter.com/GodzillaVsKong

---

From Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures comes the long-awaited face-off between two icons, вҖңGodzilla vs. Kong,вҖқ the next epic adventure in LegendaryвҖҷs cinematic Monsterverse, directed by Adam Wingard.

Legends collide in вҖңGodzilla vs. KongвҖқ as these mythic adversaries meet in a spectacular battle for the ages, with the fate of the world hanging in the balance.  Kong and his protectors undertake a perilous journey to find his true home, and with them is Jia, a young orphaned girl with whom he has formed a unique and powerful bond.  But they unexpectedly find themselves in the path of an enraged Godzilla, cutting a swath of destruction across the globe.  The epic clash between the two titansвҖ”instigated by unseen forcesвҖ”is only the beginning of the mystery that lies deep within the core of the Earth.

The film stars Alexander SkarsgГҘrd (вҖңBig Little Lies,вҖқ вҖңThe Little Drummer GirlвҖқ), Millie Bobby Brown (вҖңStranger ThingsвҖқ), Rebecca Hall (вҖңChristine,вҖқ вҖңProfessor Marston and the Wonder WomenвҖқ), Brian Tyree Henry (вҖңJoker,вҖқ вҖңSpider-Man: Into the Spider-VerseвҖқ), Shun Oguri (вҖңWeathering with YouвҖқ), Eiza GonzГЎlez (вҖңFast & Furious Presents: Hobbs & ShawвҖқ), Julian Dennison (вҖңDeadpool 2вҖқ), with Kyle Chandler (вҖңGodzilla: King of the MonstersвҖқ) and DemiГЎn Bichir (вҖңThe Nun,вҖқ вҖңThe Hateful EightвҖқ).
Wingard (вҖңThe Guest,вҖқ вҖңYouвҖҷre NextвҖқ) directed from a screenplay by Eric Pearson (вҖңThor: RagnarokвҖқ) and Max Borenstein (вҖңGodzilla: King of the Monsters,вҖқ вҖңKong: Skull IslandвҖқ), story by Terry Rossio (вҖңPirates of the Caribbean: Dead Men Tell No TalesвҖқ) and Michael Dougherty & Zach Shields (вҖңGodzilla: King of the MonstersвҖқ), based on the character вҖңGodzillaвҖқ owned and created by TOHO CO., LTD.  The film was produced by Mary Parent, Alex Garcia, Eric McLeod, Jon Jashni, Thomas Tull and Brian Rogers, with Jay Ashenfelter, Herbert W. Gains, Dan Lin, Roy Lee, Yoshimitsu Banno and Kenji Okuhira executive producing.

The directorвҖҷs behind-the-scenes creative team included director of photography Ben Seresin (вҖңThe Mummy,вҖқ вҖңWorld War ZвҖқ), production designers Owen Paterson (вҖңJumanji: Welcome to the Jungle,вҖқ вҖңGodzillaвҖқ) and Thomas S. Hammock (вҖңBlair WitchвҖқ), editor Josh Schaeffer (вҖңGodzilla: King of the MonstersвҖқ), costume designer Ann Foley (вҖңSkyscraperвҖқ) and visual effects supervisor John вҖңDJвҖқ DesJardin (upcoming вҖңZack SnyderвҖҷs Justice LeagueвҖқ).

Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures Present a Legendary Pictures Production, A Film By Adam Wingard, вҖңGodzilla vs. Kong.вҖқ  The film will be released nationwide in 2D and 3D in select theaters and IMAX on March 26, 2021 and will be available in the U.S. on HBO Max for 31 days from theatrical release.  It is rated PG-13 for intense sequences of creature violence/destruction and brief language.

Drishyam 2 Official Trailer 2020,

Starring: Mohanlal, Meena, Siddique, Asha Sharath, Murali Gopy, Ansiba, Esther, Saikumar

A gripping tale of an investigation and a family which is threatened by it. Will Georgekutty be able to protect his family this time?

snippet.title: Starship | SN9 | High-Altitude Flight Test
snippet.description:
On Tuesday, February 2, Starship serial number 9 (SN9) completed SpaceXвҖҷs second high-altitude flight test of a Starship prototype from our site in Cameron County, Texas.

Similar to the high-altitude flight test of Starship serial number 8 (SN8), SN9 was powered through ascent by three Raptor engines, each shutting down in sequence prior to the vehicle reaching apogee вҖ“ approximately 10 kilometers in altitude. SN9 successfully performed a propellant transition to the internal header tanks, which hold landing propellant, before reorienting itself for reentry and a controlled aerodynamic descent.

The Starship prototype descended under active aerodynamic control, accomplished by independent movement of two forward and two aft flaps on the vehicle. All four flaps are actuated by an onboard flight computer to control StarshipвҖҷs attitude during flight and enable precise landing at the intended location. During the landing flip maneuver, one of the Raptor engines did not relight and caused SN9 to land at high speed and experience a RUD.

These test flights are all about improving our understanding and development of a fully reusable transportation system designed to carry both crew and cargo on long-duration, interplanetary flights and help humanity return to the Moon, and travel to Mars and beyond.

snippet.title: Starship SN9 Flight Test
snippet.description:
SpaceX is set to launch the Starship SN9 prototype to an altitude of approximately 10 kilometers. A launch attempt is possible between 9 am and 6 pm Central time on Tuesday. However, as with testing, there is always a chance that teams could decide to stand down and try again on a different day.

snippet.title: Footballers REACT to Messi's LEAKED contract!
snippet.description:
The OneFootball x 442oons show is back with players reacting to Lionel Messi's leaked contract! With the Barcelona star earning an insane amount of money, Cristiano Ronaldo wants the same from Juventus, Liverpool and Jurgen Klopp are trying to work out how to pay Messi, Neymar and Mbappe are offered a new PSG deal and Man City's Pep Guardiola could finally get his reunion!

Check back Monday to Friday for the OneFootball Daily News, plus all the other Premier League, Bundesliga, La Liga, Serie A and European and world football content we have going up on the channel regularly!

snippet.title: Riverdale Season 5 "Future Is Now" Promo (HD) Time Jump
snippet.description:
SEVEN-YEAR TIME JUMP вҖ” After spending seven years away from Riverdale, Archie (KJ Apa) returns to find the town is now under Hiram LodgeвҖҷs (Mark Consuelos) grip and on the verge of becoming a ghost town. When Toni (Vanessa Morgan) catches him up on whatвҖҷs been going on, Archie reaches out to the rest of the gang to return home. Lili Reinhart, Camila Mendes, Cole Sprouse, Madelaine Petsch, Casey Cott, Charles Melton, Drew Ray Tanner and Erinn Westbrook also star. Steve Adelson directed the episode written by Roberto Aguirre-Sacasa (#504). Original airdate 2/10/2021. Subscribe to tvpromosdb on Youtube for more Riverdale season 5 promos in HD!

snippet.title: I am so confused.
snippet.description:
Schlatt wonders why his last video got 80,000 comments.

Follow me on Twitter:
https://twitter.com/jschlatt

Follow me on Instagram:
https://instagram.com/jschlatt

Truly disgusting, that some people would do this horrible thing. Why? Why did you comment this? Are you part of the problem? No, I'll tell you what the problem is. The problem is that TommyInnit and the Dream SMP are getting more viewers than me even though I'm so much cooler than everyone else on it (like Ranboo, Awesamdude, Karl Jacobs, and others whose names I forgot). Tubbo is pretty cool I guess though. Schlatt talks about why his latest video got 80,000 comments, which is insane and almost seems like algorithm manipulation (CC: Spiffing Brit). Almost as bad as the algorithm manipulation that writing these meaningless paragraphs contributes to. But hey I'm in it for the money. ToaLegend makes an appearance as well, with his hit classic "Nibble" which will now get millions of comments I bet. Please be nice.

snippet.title: 2 KOTSE AT LIMPAK-LIMPAK NA PERA, IPINAMUDMOD NG OFW SA KANYANG PRETTY GF!
snippet.description:
MAHALAGANG PAALALA:

Muli po naming pinapaalala na hanggang ngayon ay SARADO PA RIN PO ANG AMING ACTION CENTER sa TV5 Media Center, Reliance Street, Mandaluyong City.

Hindi pa rin po maaaring pumunta nang personal ang mga complainant para magreklamo kay Idol Raffy dahil sa ating kinahaharap na pandemya at mahigpit pa ring ipinapatupad ang mga safety measures upang maging ligtas ang lahat.

Gayunpaman, puwede ninyong i-PM ang inyong mga sumbong sa OFFICIAL Facebook page ni Idol na RAFFY TULFO IN ACTION na may mahigit 13M followers. Nakahanda pong tumugon sa inyo ang RTIA researchers.

Maraming salamat sa inyong pag-unawa at mag-ingat po tayong lahat!

snippet.title: Thomas Tuchel arrives at Chelsea! 442oons x OneFootball
snippet.description:
The OneFootball x 442oons show is back with Thomas Tuchel arriving at Chelsea! After Frank Lampard was sacked, former PSG and Dortmund manager Tuchel is here to take over and help Werner and Havertz get back on track, make friends with Jurgen Klopp and Liverpool, get Mason mount on his side and more!

Check out the full (serious) story of Thomas Tuchel at Chelsea from the OneFootball newsroom here: https://onefootball.com/en/news/chelsea-hire-thomas-tuchel-to-replace-frank-lampard-as-head-coach-32249643

Check back Monday to Friday for the OneFootball Daily News, plus all the other Premier League, Bundesliga, La Liga, Serie A and European and world football content we have going up on the channel regularly!

Lyrics:
DonвҖҷt play games, donвҖҷt play games with my heart
Ohh eeeee
Now the feels hit me differently

DonвҖҷt play games, donвҖҷt play games with my heart
Ohh eeeee
Now the feels hit me differently 
When theyвҖҷre hittin this deep donвҖҷt play, donвҖҷt play

KSI:
All that time on your own with me
We had fun on the 360
I helped you get that UAV
Still could never get you that AC
Sneaking in school just to get by you
IвҖҷm obsessed with the scent on you
Coco Chanel on your neck with your body in check 
Loving all the time with you 
But now youвҖҷve just gone missing
And youвҖҷre airing all my wishes
YouвҖҷre online but you still wonвҖҷt listen
All my time is you dismissing 
This is in no way a 2 way street 
IвҖҷm playing sad and itвҖҷs on repeat
Got me here hoping you see my snap
Cos IвҖҷm not ready for us to wrap
Nowoooooo

Ohh eeeee
Now the feels hit me differently 
When theyвҖҷre hittin this deep donвҖҷt play, donвҖҷt play

DonвҖҷt play games, donвҖҷt play games with my heart
Ohh eeeee
Now the feels hit me differently 
When theyвҖҷre hittin this deep donвҖҷt play, donвҖҷt play

Anne-Marie:
All the things you doing
yeah I think IвҖҷve seen it all before, seen it, seen it all before
ahhh
everything youвҖҷre saying
yeah I think IвҖҷve heard it all before yeah heard it all before
if you donвҖҷt give me your time
then I ainвҖҷt giving you mine
huh
if youвҖҷre gonna lie
then ima say goodbye 
every game youвҖҷre playing
yeah boy IвҖҷve played them all before
and I win them all

snippet.title: BMW M5 1000hp v ВЈ1.15M Rallycross Racers: RACE...and EXPLOSION!
snippet.description:
Need help buying your next car? Click https://www.carwow.co.uk/help-me-carwow and my team and I will help you choose your ideal car at a fair price - from Mat Watson!

Check out everything you need to know about these rallycross cars: https://www.rallycrossbrx.com/news/5nations-brx-put-to-the-test-by-carwow
.............................................................

Evolve's BMW M5 is BACK, and it's going up against three rallycross superstars! 

We've all seen what this incredible M5 can do, with its tuned 4.4-litre twin-turbo V8 able to produce 1000hp! As for the rallycars? Well, none of them can match the power of the M5, with the lead competitor being the MINI with a 2-litre turbocharged petrol engine that can put down 600hp & 1,000Nm! 

However, the M5 has one major disadvantage compared to the competition... It weighs in at 2 tonnes, while all three rallycross cars come in at just 1,300kg! 

So what do you think - is the M5 now the underdog?! Mat & Yianni have joined forces to see if they can take down these superstars, and all we know is, this race isn't to be missed!! 

.............................................................

snippet.title: PANAYAM NI IDOL RAFFY SA BEST FRIEND NI CHRISTINE DACERA.
snippet.description:
MAHALAGANG PAALALA:

Muli po naming pinapaalala na hanggang ngayon ay SARADO PA RIN PO ANG AMING ACTION CENTER sa TV5 Media Center, Reliance Street, Mandaluyong City.

Hindi pa rin po maaaring pumunta nang personal ang mga complainant para magreklamo kay Idol Raffy dahil sa ating kinahaharap na pandemya at mahigpit pa ring ipinapatupad ang mga safety measures upang maging ligtas ang lahat.

Gayunpaman, puwede ninyong i-PM ang inyong mga sumbong sa OFFICIAL Facebook page ni Idol na RAFFY TULFO IN ACTION na may mahigit 13M followers. Nakahanda pong tumugon sa inyo ang RTIA researchers.

Maraming salamat sa inyong pag-unawa at mag-ingat po tayong lahat!

snippet.title: My NEW CAR!! (Bought sight unseen off the internet)
snippet.description:

Then it's off to the track for a good old thrashing. 

Welcome back to another year of MCM. It's going to be a big one!!

snippet.title: ATTAWAY GENERAL | Season 2 | Ep. 2: вҖқPlaying GodвҖқ
snippet.description:
When a familiar face returns to Attaway General, Nina must confront her past. Benny has an uncomfortable encounter with a fellow volunteer.

ABOUT ATTAWAY GENERAL
When a group of very different teens arrive at Attaway General HospitalвҖҷs prestigious volunteer program, they must learn to work together to survive the program and make a difference in the lives of their patients.

ABOUT BRAT TV
Brat TV makes original shows with all your favorite creators! Tune in after school for full episodes of вҖңChicken Girls,вҖқ вҖңAttaway General,вҖқ вҖңCrown LakeвҖқ and more!

snippet.title: Olivia Rodrigo вҖ“ drivers license (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
вҷ« Olivia Rodrigo вҖ“ drivers license
Stream/Download - https://smarturl.it/driverslicense

 вҖўOlivia Rodrigo вҖў
 вҖўhttps://instagram.com/olivia.rodrigo
 вҖўhttps://twitter.com/Olivia_Rodrigo
 вҖўhttps://www.facebook.com/OliviaRodrig

(Lyrics):
[Verse 1]
I got my driverвҖҷs license last week
Just like we always talked about
вҖҳCause you were so excited for me
To finally drive up to your house
But today I drove through the suburbs
Crying вҖҷcause you werenвҖҷt around

[Verse 2]
And youвҖҷre probably with that blonde girl
Who always made me doubt
SheвҖҷs so much older than me
SheвҖҷs everything IвҖҷm insecure about
Yeah, today I drove through the suburbs
вҖҳCause how could I ever love someone else?

[Chorus]
And I know we werenвҖҷt perfect but IвҖҷve never felt this way for no one
And I just canвҖҷt imagine how you could be so okay now that IвҖҷm gone
Guess you didnвҖҷt mean what you wrote in that song about me
вҖҳCause you said forever, now I drive alone past your street

[Verse 3]
And all my friends are tired
Of hearing how much I miss you, but
I kinda feel sorry for them
вҖҳCause theyвҖҷll never know you the way that I do, yeah
Today I drove through the suburbs
And pictured I was driving home to you

[Chorus]
And I know we werenвҖҷt perfect but IвҖҷve never felt this way for no one, oh-oh
And I just canвҖҷt imagine how you could be so okay, now that IвҖҷm gone
I guess you didnвҖҷt mean what you wrote in that song about me
вҖҳCause you said forever, now I drive alone past your street

[Bridge]
Red lights, stop signs
I still see your face in the white cars, front yards
CanвҖҷt drive past the places we used to go to
вҖҳCause I still fuckinвҖҷ love you, babe (Ooh, ooh-ooh, ooh-ooh, ooh-ooh)
Sidewalks we crossed
I still hear your voice in the traffic, weвҖҷre laughing
Over all the noise
God IвҖҷm so blue, know weвҖҷre through
But I still fuckinвҖҷ love you, babe (Ooh, ooh-ooh, ooh-ooh, ooh-ooh)

[Chorus]
I know we werenвҖҷt perfect but IвҖҷve never felt this way for no one
And I just canвҖҷt imagine how you could be so okay, now that IвҖҷm gone
вҖҳCause you didnвҖҷt mean what you wrote in that song about me
вҖҳCause you said forever, now I drive alone past your street
Yeah, you said forever, now I drive alone past your street

snippet.title: I Finally Bought an Electric Car...
snippet.description:
I finally pulled the trigger on an electric car...


This is the Porsche Taycan Turbo S. It was a tough choice between this and a Tesla (both are awesome cars). The Tesla has a lot more in terms of autonomous tech/software where the Taycan leans into Porsche's racing heritage/feel. The Taycan Turbo S is likely a touch faster around a race track compared to Tesla's current performance model as well (if that matters to you).

Porsche North Toronto
Insta - https://www.instagram.com/PorscheNorthToronto/
Youtube - https://youtube.com/c/PorscheCentreNorthToronto
